title: ziziphora woronowii
intro: Ziziphora woronowii, also known as Persian balm, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ziziphora woronowii include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems such as colds and coughs. Herbal preparations of Ziziphora woronowii typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea or using it as an essential oil.
